emails.subject: FW: Refresh pricing
emails.body: FW: Refresh pricing I think we should keep the $6.00 offers. Natsource can get us done at $5.00 Do you remember what the total volumes are for this deal? To: Ring, Richard; Mainzer, Elliot

emails.subject: FW: Refresh pricing

emails.subject: RE: Refresh pricing
emails.body: RE: Refresh pricing Elliot, Total annual MWh's is approximately 8,800. Richard To: Ring, Richard
